name: flarestack
description: SaaS-ready, edge-native IP reputation and automated blocking system for Cloudflare.

scripts.//stop: Use 'pnpm stop' when closing the terminal tab (instead of Ctrl+C) leaves orphan dev servers holding ports 5173, 8787, or 9229. Ctrl+C in the same terminal sends SIGINT to the whole process group and kills everything cleanly — but closing the tab only kills pnpm, leaving grandchild node/wrangler processes running as orphans.
